recommendations.title: The Princess Switch
recommendations.overview: When a down-to-earth Chicago baker and a soon-to-be princess discover they look like twins, they hatch a Christmastime plan to trade places.

recommendations.title: A Christmas Miracle for Daisy
recommendations.overview: Whitney Alder owns interior design firm Marietta Designs, which she runs with her friend Andi in the small town of Marietta, Montana. Whitney is designing Santa’s float for the annual Marietta Christmas Parade when a potential job opportunity comes h

recommendations.title: The Princess Switch: Switched Again
recommendations.overview: When Duchess Margaret unexpectedly inherits the throne & hits a rough patch with Kevin, it’s up to Stacy to save the day before a new lookalike — party girl Fiona — foils their plans.

recommendations.title: The Princess Switch 3: Romancing the Star
recommendations.overview: A priceless relic is stolen from identical royals Queen Margaret and Princess Stacy, who enlist the help of their sketchy look-alike cousin Fiona Pembroke to retrieve it.

recommendations.title: Red Shoes and the Seven Dwarfs
recommendations.genres: Animation, Fantasy, Family, Comedy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Princes who have been turned into Dwarfs seek the red shoes of a lady in order to break the spell, although it will not be easy.

recommendations.title: Train to Busan
recommendations.overview: When a zombie virus pushes Korea into a state of emergency, those trapped on an express train to Busan must fight for their own survival.

recommendations.title: Spellbound
recommendations.overview: A magician meets a weird girl and offers her to work together in his magic show. It's only until a year later that he starts to know her personally and develops a feeling towards her despite her own problems.

recommendations.title: A Day
recommendations.overview: Three years ago,  a father saved his daughter's life. After she's involved in a car accident, it looks like he'll have to do it again, no matter how many attempts it takes.

recommendations.title: Mrs. Doubtfire
recommendations.overview: Loving but irresponsible dad Daniel Hillard, estranged from his exasperated spouse, is crushed by a court order allowing only weekly visits with his kids. When Daniel learns his ex needs a housekeeper, he gets the job -- disguised as a British nanny.

recommendations.title: 100 Days with Mr. Arrogant
recommendations.overview: After being dumped by her boyfriend just before their 100-day anniversary, Ha-young meets a college guy named Hyung-joon when she kicks a can that accidentally hits him in the face and causes him to scratch his Lexus. He demands she pay him $3000 on
